Invoice — Olive Glass & Marble

Invoice Tax Handling — NC Real Property (7%) Choose at final invoice close
Uncheck for jobs that do not qualify (single QB line + 7% tax back-out instead).
Single QB line item (not using 2-line split)
One line in QuickBooks for the full invoice. Back 7% tax out of entire invoice is turned on automatically — uncheck below if this job is different.
Example: resale certificate, government exemption, out-of-state job.
Auto-filled from slab panel

QB Line 1 — $0.00
QB Line 2 — $0.00
QB items Stone tax Real Property and Stone Labor not taxed must exist in QuickBooks as Service items before import. Create once under Lists → Item List → New → Service. Set Stone tax Real Property as taxable (7%), Stone Labor not taxed as non-taxable.
Job Tracking ▾ Internal only — not included in QB export

Deposit receipt & invoice

Deposit defaults to 60% of the quote total; edit before printing. Customer and accountant copies use the same customer name as the sidebar.
